title: Add notes to check version on problem
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a note scattered about the site to have people check their version before reporting an issue against Podman.  I included a "Latest Version" number on the README.md file and tried to get that auto update, but failed to find an easy way.  So went with a note reminder in version/version.go to update the README.md as well.  We do a similar thing in Buildah.

comments.body:
You got GOFMT errors.

LGTM once these are fixed.
One rogue space zapped, fingers crossed for green test buttons.
